nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely a collaboration. I would say I lead the process even though the AI gives me ideas.

nodes.label: AI as generator of diverse ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI for direct generation of final products
nodes.grounding_span: I have a more extensive brainstorming and ideation process, and I end up with more diverse kits as a result.

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I will download one I like and use it as a reference for my artwork.

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will typically upload it to AI and ask it to tell me what it is missing or what would make it look better.

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to see the AI being able to really help me automate the boring parts of my job.

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely think it detracts from what I like about art - the fact that someone created that and now I am using it.

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: my creation process is now longer, but it's also more fun I'd say

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely think it detracts from what I like about art - the fact that someone created that and now I am using it.

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: automate the boring parts of my job

nodes.label: Positive view of AI as thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: I think usually we work together well, and it is extremely helpful for me.

nodes.label: Concern for artists directly impacted by AI
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely think it detracts from what I like about art

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to see the AI being able to really help me automate the boring parts of my job.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I always provide it with feedback and get more clear on what I want it to produce.

nodes.label: Human-led creative direction with AI as tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would say I lead the process even though the AI gives me ideas.
